title: SlapBattles
description: A recreation of the roblox game Slap Battles
body:
This mod is a recreation of a roblox game **SlapBattles**.

Use the hands to slap mobs away. Craft better and better hands to slap mobs hundreds of blocks.
And using the handstand you get hidden hands that you can't normal craft
With **46** diffent hands to make and use! What will you slap?
